title: BEM-722C kick watchdog
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 12:56 (UTC+3)'
active=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(active.read_text(errors='ignore')) if active.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v2','active':True,'run_id':'bem703_bem712_watchdog','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','operator_role':'none','kick_reason':'BEM-722C force push trigger for minute watchdog workflow','kicked_at':created})
active.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'schema_version':'kick_minute_watchdog_active_flag.v1','bem':'BEM-722C','status':'active_flag_kicked','expected_effect':'push should trigger .github/workflows/claude-mailbox-minute-watchdog.yml','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem722c_kick_minute_watchdog_active_flag.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem722c_kick_minute_watchdog_active_flag.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-722C | Kick Minute Watchdog Active Flag | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Active flag changed; push should trigger minute watchdog workflow.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem722c_kick_minute_watchdog_active_flag','status':'active_flag_kicked','blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem722c_kick_minute_watchdog_active_flag.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-722C PASS: active flag kicked to trigger minute watchdog workflow.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(active),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Updated active watchdog flag to force a push event for claude-mailbox-minute-watchdog workflow')
